report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Lido V3 stVaults modular staking infrastructure and Institutional Crypto Adoption 2026 (BlackRock, SEC-CFTC framework, AI convergence). Both pages scaffolded, SEO-optimized, and added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Lido V3 launched stVaults on Ethereum mainnet (Jan 30, 2026) — modular staking primitives enabling institutional customization, validator selection, and DeFi leverage loops. Goal: 1M ETH staked by end of 2026.

Institutional crypto adoption accelerating: BlackRock BUIDL fund at $2.85B, tokenized RWA market at $35.6B, SEC-CFTC joint framework classifying 16 assets as digital commodities (Mar 17), BlackRock flagging AI as crypto's next big use case (Mar 24).
Sources: Lido blog, Figment, Blockworks, CoinDesk, CoinMarketCap, OANDA, Santiment, DL News, BlackRock thematic outlook

sections.title: Content Created
items: Lido V3 stVaults Guide (~3,100 words): 8 sections covering stVaults architecture, customization features, DeFi yield loops, tokenomics, competitor comparison table (vs Rocket Pool, cbETH, Frax, Mantle), risks with severity ratings, getting started guide, 6 FAQs

Institutional Crypto Adoption Guide (~2,800 words): 8 sections covering BlackRock BUIDL strategy, Wall Street players table (JPMorgan/Morgan Stanley/Citi), SEC-CFTC regulatory framework, ETF products (including staked ETFs), AI+crypto convergence thesis, retail investor implications, 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Lido V3: title 'Lido V3 stVaults Guide 2026: Modular Staking Infrastructure' (59 chars), target keyword 'Lido V3 stVaults', Article + FAQ schemas, 5 internal links
Institutional Adoption: title 'Institutional Crypto Adoption 2026 Guide | degen0x' (52 chars), target keyword 'institutional crypto adoption', Article + FAQ schemas, 6 internal links
Both pages: OpenGraph article type, Twitter summary_large_image cards, canonical URLs, keyword arrays, published dates set to 2026-03-25

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No new interactive components required — both are educational learn guides using existing BackToTop, Breadcrumb, and StructuredData components

sections.title: Publishing
items: Both slugs added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in src/lib/published-pages.ts under 'Daily Build Cycle — 2026-03-25 (batch 6)' comment block
